description: Composition Blue V-neck printed kurta made of 100% polyester crepe, has a small collar, three quarter length sleeves, pintucks on front which open out at waist and long vents at sides Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta from biba is made of soft crepe fabric which means it falls beautifully, flattering your curves while the bright printed colours sing out of the dark background. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
